posts.author: emmanuelkatto23 (Emmanuel Katto )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m Emmanuel Katto, looking for a way to connect Monday.com to Google Data Studio in order to send data from some of our boards for more in-depth report analysis. I know Monday has a pivot widget, but I’m not looking to upgrade to the Enterprise plan just for this feature.

Does anyone know of an existing solution or workaround that would allow me to integrate Monday.com data with Google Data Studio? Any suggestions or tools that have worked for you would be really helpful.

Looking forward to hearing your ideas!

Regards
Emmanuel Katto
